jsonLd.title: Upstox is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Upstox in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Upstox:
Upstox is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
